_comment: Synthetic 'tier defaults' fixture consumed by data.tf via data "local_file". Demonstrates the data-source-injection pattern (real frameworks replace this with a live data source — e.g., proxmox-terraform-framework reads VM templates from the Proxmox API and injects template node_name/vm_id into clone configs). Each tier maps to default sizing/retention values that locals.tf merges with each environment's per-env overrides.
